items.description: In the most recent trading session, Honeywell International Inc. (HON) closed at $195.96, indicating a -1.58% shift from the previous trading day.

items.title: Honeywell Stock Is Down on a Litigation Charge. Why It Shouldn’t Be.
items.description: Honeywell  stock dropped early Monday after announcing a litigation charge and changes to full-year guidance.  None of the things announced amounts to much, but Honeywell investors aren’t feeling charitable this holiday season.  Shares were down more than 2% in premarket trading before recovering to close at $195.65, down 1.6%, while the  and  gained 0.6% and 0.5%, respectively.

items.title: Dominion wind farm project on pause, Honeywell cuts Q4 outlook
items.description: Yahoo Finance host Josh Lipton tracks today's top moving stocks and biggest market stories in this Market Minute, including Dominion Energy (D) share falling after the US Department of Energy put a pause on the company's offshore wind farm project in Virginia and Honeywell (HON) lowering its fourth quarter forecasts. Stay up to date on the latest market action, minute-by-minute, with Yahoo Finance's Market Minute.
